creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port requires additional enhancements that should be addressed.

Per: Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier@gmail.com>


In past, I worked on this port, but I think it needs to be enhanced:

- It's right it depends of devel/gvfs, but FUSE needs to be installed,
otherwise Gigolo don't work (my latest test was 2 years ago).
- As it needs FUSE, this port works only on i386 and amd64 architectures.

You can see my work here,
http://code.google.com/p/olivier-freebsd-ports/source/browse/sysutils/gigolo

-jgh

--
Jason Helfman          | FreeBSD Committer
jgh@FreeBSD.org     | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh  | The Power to Serve
